steps.t: Mandan often walks far and wide throughout the Angle, but Mithrendan thinks you should look for the Herb-master somewhere by a river north-east of Tor…
You found Mandan on an island in the middle of a river north-east of Tornhad, and the herb-master of the Dúnedain seems to be in no more danger than t…
The Ranger Mandan has asked for your help gathering a number of the items for which he left Tornhad: luminescent gel from the glow-flies of the Angle,…
Mandan is on the island in the middle of a river north-east of Tornhad, waiting for you to return with the items he requested.
The Ranger Mithrendan is at Tornhad.
